title: CUDA out of memory
advice: Reduce batch size or context length.
Enable mixed precision to cut activation memory.
Profile peak memory around the forward pass.

title: Tensor shape mismatch
advice: Log tensor shapes before the failing operator.
Check feature width after embedding or pooling.
Verify the output layer against the label schema.

title: Exploding loss
advice: Lower the learning rate and apply gradient clipping.
Inspect normalization and target scaling.
Compare with a smaller baseline model.

title: Training plateau
advice: Tune the scheduler or optimizer settings.
Increase model capacity or improve features.
Audit the dataset for noisy or imbalanced labels.

title: Overfitting
advice: Add regularization and early stopping.
Increase data augmentation.
Reduce model size or train fewer epochs.

title: Data pipeline failure
advice: Validate the dataset manifest and file paths.
Run with one worker to isolate the bad sample.
Log the first batch before training starts.

title: Optimization instability
advice: Lower the learning rate or add warmup.
Inspect weight decay and beta settings.
Compare the run against a smaller baseline configuration.
